name: Nimrod
oracleText:
Reach
Whenever Nimrod attacks, another target creature you control gets +2/+0 and gains trample until end of turn.
Whenever a creature an opponent controls dealt damage by a creature you controlled this turn dies, create a Treasure token.
flavorText: "He was a mighty hunter before the Lord." — Genesis 10:9
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme reuses the existing Early World Babel-era tower artwork for Nimrod's old-master treatment.
title: Hunter Before the Lord
